EDC16CP33 - JD6A - (Diag On CAN) v1

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 7E0
Recv ID: 7E8
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 7A
Func Name: Injection

[
  {
    "minbytes": 63,
    "sentbytes": "21A0",
    "name": "Trame A0",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "APC": {
        "firstbyte": 27,

      },

      },
